title: Incident Response Playbook
content: Severity classification, paging matrix, and mitigation checklist for P0-P3 incidents. Includes communication templates and postmortem timeline standards.

title: Payments Rollback Runbook
content: Step-by-step rollback procedure for payments-api including feature flags, database migration safeguards, and verification checks.

title: On-Call Escalation Policy
content: Primary ack target is 5 minutes. Escalation to secondary after 10 minutes and incident commander assignment after 15 minutes for Sev-1/2.

title: Security Access Review SOP
content: Quarterly access recertification policy for privileged systems. Includes emergency revoke workflow and evidence requirements.

title: Search Ranking Experiment Guide
content: Experiment lifecycle for search relevance updates: hypothesis, guardrail metrics, rollout gates, and rollback triggers.

title: Engineering Roadmap Q2
content: Cross-team quarterly plan with milestones for reliability, developer productivity, and cost optimization programs.

title: Data Retention Policy
content: Retention windows by data class: logs 90 days hot/365 days cold, PII snapshots encrypted and restricted with 30-day purge SLA.

title: Helpdesk Triage Matrix
content: Ticket priority matrix and assignment workflow for internal support issues. Defines SLA targets by severity and business impact.
